title: Test: Add security tests with OWASP ZAP scanner
original_text: Added security tests with OWASP ZAP. Implemented vulnerability scanning. Added security headers testing. Implemented authentication testing. Added authorization testing. Result: security tests pass.
expected_subject: test(security): add security tests with OWASP ZAP
expected_command: git commit -m "test(security): add security tests with OWASP ZAP"
